name: Resume RFQ Endpoint - Resume from Agent Run ID
description: Validates the /rfq/resume endpoint resumes processing from a valid agent_run_id and completes the workflow.
input: POST /rfq/resume with valid agent_run_id and pipeline_run_id, where the corresponding blob exists.
output: JSON response with success: true, quote_number, output_blob_path, and success message.
error_scenarios: Blob for agent_run_id does not exist
Resume logic fails due to missing or corrupt data
